_comment: Player races. statMods are multiplicative modifiers applied on top of the class's level-scaled base stats. 1.0 = no change, 1.1 = +10%, 0.95 = -5%. Each race may list a 'raceSkill' that is granted automatically at level 1 and usable only by that race (enforced server-side via skill.races).

human.name: Human
human.description: Versatile and resilient. Balanced bonuses to vitality, mana and strength.

elf.name: Elf
elf.description: Graceful and attuned to arcane energy. Greater mana reserves and nimble footing.

dwarf.name: Dwarf
dwarf.description: Hardy mountain folk with thick hides. Massive vitality at the cost of a sliver of speed.

orc.name: Orc
orc.description: Fierce warriors whose raw might cleaves through armor.
